lines.english: Why did Elizabeth tell Nigel that she was going to the dentist?
lines.chinese: 伊丽莎白为什么告诉奈杰尔她要去看牙医？
lines.raw: Why did Elizabeth tell Nigel that she was going to the dentist? | 伊丽莎白为什么告诉奈杰尔她要去看牙医？

lines.english: I crossed the street to avoid meeting him but he saw me and came running towards me.
lines.chinese: 我穿过街道，想避开他，但他看见了我，朝我跑过来。
lines.raw: I crossed the street to avoid meeting him but he saw me and came running towards me. | 我穿过街道，想避开他，但他看见了我，朝我跑过来。

lines.english: It was no use pretending that I had not seen him, so I waved to him.
lines.chinese: 假装没看见他也没用，所以我朝他挥了挥手。
lines.raw: It was no use pretending that I had not seen him, so I waved to him. | 假装没看见他也没用，所以我朝他挥了挥手。

lines.english: I never enjoy meeting Nigel Dykes.
lines.chinese: 我从不喜欢遇到奈杰尔·戴克斯。
lines.raw: I never enjoy meeting Nigel Dykes. | 我从不喜欢遇到奈杰尔·戴克斯。

lines.english: He never has anything to do.
lines.raw: He never has anything to do. | 他从没有什么事可做。

lines.english: No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you.
lines.chinese: 不管你有多忙，他总是坚持要和你一起去。
lines.raw: No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you. | 不管你有多忙，他总是坚持要和你一起去。

lines.english: I had to think of a way of preventing him from following me around all morning.
lines.chinese: 我得想个办法阻止他整个上午跟着我。
lines.raw: I had to think of a way of preventing him from following me around all morning. | 我得想个办法阻止他整个上午跟着我。

lines.english: 'Hello, Nigel,' I said 'Fancy meeting you here!'
lines.chinese: “你好，奈杰尔，”我说，“真巧在这儿见到你！”
lines.raw: 'Hello, Nigel,' I said 'Fancy meeting you here!' | “你好，奈杰尔，”我说，“真巧在这儿见到你！”

lines.english: 'Hi, Elizabeth,' Nigel answered. 'I was just wondering how to spend the morning--until I saw you.
lines.chinese: “嗨，伊丽莎白，”奈杰尔回答，“我刚才还在想怎么打发这个上午呢——直到我看见你。
lines.raw: 'Hi, Elizabeth,' Nigel answered. 'I was just wondering how to spend the morning--until I saw you. | “嗨，伊丽莎白，”奈杰尔回答，“我刚才还在想怎么打发这个上午呢——直到我看见你。

lines.english: You're not busy doing anything, are you?'
lines.chinese: 你没什么事要做吧，是吗？”
lines.raw: You're not busy doing anything, are you?' | 你没什么事要做吧，是吗？”

lines.english: 'No, not at all,' I answered. 'I'm going to...'
lines.chinese: “不，一点也不忙，”我回答，“我要去……”
lines.raw: 'No, not at all,' I answered. 'I'm going to...' | “不，一点也不忙，”我回答，“我要去……”

lines.english: 'Would you mind my coming with you?' he asked, before I had finished speaking.
lines.chinese: “你介意我跟你一起去吗？”他没等我说完就问道。
lines.raw: 'Would you mind my coming with you?' he asked, before I had finished speaking. | “你介意我跟你一起去吗？”他没等我说完就问道。

lines.english: 'Not at all,' I lied, 'but I'm going to the dentist.'
lines.chinese: “一点也不，”我撒谎说，“不过我要去看牙医。”
lines.raw: 'Not at all,' I lied, 'but I'm going to the dentist.' | “一点也不，”我撒谎说，“不过我要去看牙医。”

lines.english: 'Then I'll come with you,' he answered.
lines.raw: 'Then I'll come with you,' he answered. | “那我跟你一起去，”他回答道。

lines.english: 'There's always plenty to read in the waiting room!'
lines.chinese: “候诊室里总是有很多东西可以读的！”
lines.raw: 'There's always plenty to read in the waiting room!' | “候诊室里总是有很多东西可以读的！”
